declarations.description:
OLButton - A pure-presentation button primitive.

Renders a real <button> element into the light DOM so global CSS styles
it both before and after hydration. Handles variants, sizes, loading,
disabled, and form submission for type="submit" / type="reset".

Contains no application-specific logic, copy, or translations. The
consuming page owns what the button *does* — this component only owns
how it looks and basic interaction semantics.
declarations.name: OLButton

slots.description: Default slot carries the button label.

members.name: variant
members.description: "primary" | "secondary" | "destructive". Default: "primary"

members.name: size
members.description: "small" | "medium" | "large". Default: "medium"

members.name: type
members.description: "button" | "submit" | "reset". Default: "button"

members.name: loading
members.description: Shows a spinner and disables interaction.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables interaction.

members.name: fullWidth
members.description: Button expands to fill its container.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: "primary" | "secondary" | "destructive". Default: "primary"

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: "small" | "medium" | "large". Default: "medium"

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: "button" | "submit" | "reset". Default: "button"

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Shows a spinner and disables interaction.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables interaction.

attributes.name: full-width
attributes.description: Button expands to fill its container.

declarations.description:
OLChip - A pill-shaped interactive chip web component

Supports two sizes, a selected state with a close icon,
click events, and optional link behavior via href.
declarations.name: OLChip

members.description: Whether the chip is in a selected state

members.name: size
members.description: Chip size: "small" or "medium" (default)

members.name: href
members.description: When set, the chip renders as a link

members.name: count
members.description: Optional count displayed to the right of the label

members.name: accessibleLabel
members.description: Override aria-label on the inner interactive element

events.description: Fired on click. detail: { selected: Boolean }

OLChipGroup - A flex-wrap container for ol-chip components

Provides consistent spacing and wrapping behavior for groups of chips.

declarations.description:
OLReadMore - A web component for expandable/collapsible content Uses height-based truncation via `max-height` attribute. Important: The default max-height is 80px. If you want to use a different max-height, you must also set a min-height on the component with an inline style. The value of the min-height should be the max-height + 41px or max-height + 27px if using a small label size. Example:

Long content here...
declarations.name: OLReadMore

declarations.description: A pagination component that displays page numbers with navigation controls.
declarations.name: OlPagination

members.name: _leftArrowIcon
members.default: html`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6"/></svg>`
members.description: Left chevron arrow icon

members.name: _rightArrowIcon
members.default: html`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>`
members.description: Right chevron arrow icon

members.name: _interpolateLabel
members.description: Interpolate a label template by replacing {key} placeholders with values.

members.name: _getPageUrl
members.description:
Build URL for a specific page number.
Uses baseUrl if provided, otherwise falls back to the current window location.
This preserves all existing query parameters (like changequery() does).

members.name: _getVisiblePages
members.description:
Calculate which page numbers to display based on current page and total pages.
Always shows exactly 5 page numbers max, adjusting position based on current page:
- Near start: 1, 2, 3, 4 ... last (5 total)
- Middle: 1 ... current-1, current, current+1 ... last (5 total)
- Near end: 1 ... last-3, last-2, last-1, last (5 total)

members.name: _getFocusableElements
members.description: Get all focusable elements in the pagination

members.name: _handleKeyDown
members.description: Handle keyboard navigation within the pagination

members.name: _goToPage

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to navigate to

members.description: Navigate to a specific page

members.name: _handlePageClick
members.description:
Handle click on anchor-based page links.
Dispatches the ol-pagination-change event to allow interception.
If the event is cancelled via preventDefault(), anchor navigation is also prevented.

members.name: _renderPaginationItem

type.text:
@param {Number} options.page - Target page number
     * @param {String} options.label - Aria label for the item
     * @param {String} options.className - Additional CSS class
     * @param {TemplateResult} options.content - Content to render inside the item
     *

members.description: Render a pagination item (button or anchor based on URL mode)

members.name: _renderPageButton
members.description: Render a single page button/link or ellipsis

members.name: _renderNavArrow
members.description: Render a navigation arrow (previous or next)

members.name: mode
members.description: Display mode: "full" (default) shows page numbers with arrows, "arrows" shows only previous/next arrows (useful when total is unknown)

members.name: totalPages
members.description: Total number of pages (required for "full" mode)

members.name: currentPage
members.description: Currently selected page (1-indexed)

members.name: hasNextPage
members.description: Whether a next page exists. Only used in "arrows" mode. In "full" mode, this is derived from totalPages.

members.name: baseUrl
members.description: Optional base URL for generating page links. When omitted, falls back to the current page URL, preserving all existing query parameters (similar to changequery). Always renders anchor tags for SEO-friendly navigation.

members.name: labelPreviousPage
members.description: Aria label for "previous page" button (default: "Go to previous page")

members.name: labelNextPage
members.description: Aria label for "next page" button (default: "Go to next page")

members.name: labelGoToPage
members.description: Aria label template for page buttons, use {page} as placeholder (default: "Go to page {page}")

members.name: labelCurrentPage
members.description: Aria label template for current page, use {page} as placeholder (default: "Page {page}, current page")

members.name: labelPagination
members.description: Aria label for the navigation landmark (default: "Pagination")

events.description: Fired when a page is selected. detail: { page: Number }
events.name: ol-pagination-change

declarations.description:
A reusable popover component that anchors to a trigger element.

Renders a trigger slot and a popover panel that opens/closes with animation.
The popover uses `position: fixed` to escape overflow clipping and animates
from the trigger's location using `transform-origin`.

Self-manages open state by default — clicking the slotted trigger toggles
the popover, Escape and outside-click close it. Consumers can drive `open`
imperatively for programmatic control. The `ol-popover-close` event is
cancelable: call `event.preventDefault()` to keep the popover open.

Automatically flips and shifts when the panel would overflow the viewport.
Repositions on scroll and resize. On mobile viewports, renders as a bottom
tray with a drag handle, swipe-to-dismiss, and body scroll locking.

Traps focus within the popover while open and restores focus to the
previously-focused element on close. The host's `aria-label` is forwarded
to the inner dialog as its accessible name.
declarations.name: OlPopover

members.name: _cleanup
members.description:
Central cleanup called when the popover finishes closing.
Removes all global listeners, unlocks scroll, and restores focus.

members.name: _computePosition
members.description:
Compute the final position of the popover panel, flipping and shifting
as needed to keep it within the viewport.

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the popover is currently open

members.name: placement
members.description: Preferred placement relative to the trigger. Format: "{side}-{align}" where side is "top" or "bottom" and align is "start", "center", or "end". Default: "bottom-center"

members.name: offset
members.description: Gap in px between trigger and popover (default: 4)

members.name: autoClose
members.description: Whether outside clicks close the popover. Escape always closes for accessibility. Default: true

events.name: ol-popover-open
events.description: Fired when the popover opens. detail: { placement: String }

events.name: ol-popover-close
events.description: Cancelable. Fired when the popover requests to close. Call `preventDefault()` to keep it open. Note: the swipe-dismiss close fires after the gesture completes and is not cancelable. detail: { reason: 'escape' | 'outside-click' | 'swipe' | 'trigger' }

attributes.description: Forwarded to the inner dialog as its accessible name.
attributes.name: aria-label
open
attributes.description: Whether the popover is currently open

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Preferred placement relative to the trigger. Format: "{side}-{align}" where side is "top" or "bottom" and align is "start", "center", or "end". Default: "bottom-center"

attributes.name: offset
attributes.description: Gap in px between trigger and popover (default: 4)

attributes.name: auto-close
attributes.description: Whether outside clicks close the popover. Escape always closes for accessibility. Default: true

declarations.description:
A trigger button paired with a popover containing a multi-select list of items,
an optional filter input, and a "clear selections" footer.

Composes `<ol-popover>` internally for animation, focus trap, mobile tray, and
Escape/outside-click dismissal. The list is grouped: when items are selected,
a "SELECTED" group renders above a "SUGGESTIONS" group. Group membership is
reactive — checking an item moves it to the SELECTED group immediately.
declarations.name: OlSelectPopover

slots.description: Optional custom trigger element. When omitted, a styled default button renders showing `label` plus a "(n)" badge when items are selected and a chevron icon.
slots.name: trigger

members.name: _chevronIcon
members.default: html`<svg class="trigger-chevron" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg>`
members.description: Chevron icon for the default trigger

members.name: _searchIcon
members.default: html`<svg class="filter-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>`
members.description: Search icon for the filter input

members.name: items
members.description: List of `{ value, label }` objects. Settable as JSON attribute (`items='[{"value":"en","label":"English"}]'`) or property.

members.name: selected
members.description: Array of selected `value`s. Reflects to attribute as JSON.

members.name: label
members.description: Default trigger button text (e.g. "Language").

members.name: searchThreshold
members.description: Show the filter input when `items.length` exceeds this value. Default `8`. Use `0` to always show, a large number (e.g. `999`) to never show. Attribute: `search-threshold`.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Filter input placeholder.

members.name: unselectedHeading
members.description: Heading for the list when nothing is selected (e.g. "LANGUAGES"). Falls back to `suggestionsHeading` if unset.

members.name: selectedHeading
members.description: Heading for the SELECTED group (default "SELECTED").

members.name: suggestionsHeading
members.description: Heading for the suggestions group when ≥1 item is selected (default "SUGGESTIONS").

members.name: clearLabel
members.description: Label for the clear-selections button (default "Clear selections").

members.name: noMatchesLabel
members.description: Empty-state text when the filter has no matches (default "No matches").

events.name: ol-select-popover-clear
events.description: Fires when the clear-selections button is clicked. A change event also fires with the cleared selection.

events.name: ol-select-popover-change
events.description: Fires when the selection changes. detail: { selected: String[], added: String|null, removed: String|null }

attributes.description: Accessible name for the popover dialog. Falls back to `label` if unset.
attributes.name: aria-label
items
attributes.description: List of `{ value, label }` objects. Settable as JSON attribute (`items='[{"value":"en","label":"English"}]'`) or property.

attributes.name: selected

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Default trigger button text (e.g. "Language").

attributes.name: search-threshold
attributes.description: Show the filter input when `items.length` exceeds this value. Default `8`. Use `0` to always show, a large number (e.g. `999`) to never show. Attribute: `search-threshold`.

attributes.name: placeholder

attributes.name: unselected-heading

declarations.description:
OTP login flow for Open Library.

Renders a trigger button that opens a modal dialog. The modal walks the
patron through two steps:
  1. Enter email  → POST /account/login/otp/issue
  2. Enter code   → POST /account/login/otp/redeem  (via ia-otp-form)

On success the page navigates to the server-sanitized redirect URL.

The overlay is appended directly to document.body (a "portal") and managed
imperatively so that it escapes any ancestor stacking contexts. Lit's
declarative render() is only used for the trigger button inside the shadow DOM.

Usage:
  <ol-otp-login></ol-otp-login>
  <ol-otp-login redirect="/account/books"></ol-otp-login>
declarations.name: OpenLibraryOTP

members.name: _focusFirst
members.description: Redirect Tab-past-end back to the first focusable element

members.name: _focusLast
members.description: Redirect Shift+Tab-past-start back to the last focusable element

members.name: redirect
members.description: Hint for post-login destination; sanitized server-side

attributes.name: redirect
attributes.description: Hint for post-login destination; sanitized server-side
